title: Message to NANA Shareholders on the Annual Meeting
summary: Like much of the world and many of you, NANA has been closely tracking news of the COVID-19 (coronavirus disease 2019) outbreak. On Wednesday, the World Health Organization (WHO) declared COVID-19 a global pandemic, and on Friday evening, state officials announced the first confirmed case of the coronavirus in Alaska. As always, our main priority is the quality of life, health and safety of our people and communities. Af...

title: Message to NANA Shareholders on the Annual Meeting
summary: March 14, 2020 Dear shareholder, Like much of the world and many of you, NANA has been closely tracking news of the COVID-19 (coronavirus disease 2019) outbreak. On Wednesday, the World Health Organization (WHO) declared COVID-19 a global pandemic, and on Friday evening, state officials announced the first confirmed case of the coronavirus in Alaska.
